items.title: Oil prices jump after ships attacked near Strait of Hormuz
items.dek: Experts have warned that a prolonged conflict could push global energy prices even higher.
items.body: Experts have warned that a prolonged conflict could push global energy prices even higher.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Kidnapping of foreigners soars in Africa's lawless Sahel region
items.dek: Growing insecurity in the Sahel made 2025 one of the worst years on record for the abduction of foreigners in Africa.
items.body: Growing insecurity in the Sahel made 2025 one of the worst years on record for the abduction of foreigners in Africa.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Watch: Retaliations continue on day two of US-Israel attacks on Iran
items.dek: Donald Trump warned of more US deaths after three US service members have been killed in action on the second day of US-Israel attack on Iran.
items.body: Donald Trump warned of more US deaths after three US service members have been killed in action on the second day of US-Israel attack on Iran.
items.author: IriLine Desk
